sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: The Spirit of the Lord has filled the whole world and that which contains all things understands what is said, Alleluia.

sections.author: Francesca LaRosa
sections.snippet: Lord, send out your Spirit, and renew the face of the earth.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: Come Holy Spirit, fill the hearts of your faithful and kindle in them the fire of your love.

sections.title: New Creation
sections.author: Jackie François
sections.snippet: From death to life: I no longer live, but Christ now lives in me. Clothed in righteousness and crowned with holiness, we are new. Alleluia!

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: They were all filled with the Holy Spirit and spoke of the marvels of God, Alleluia

sections.title: Holy Spirit, Come to Me
sections.author: Julie Hoy
sections.snippet: Holy Spirit, come to me; Open my eyes to you. Holy Spirit, come to me; Open my eyes to you.

sections.title: Litany of Peace
sections.author: Barbara Bridge
sections.snippet: God of love, your gift of peace is planted deep within our hearts: Make me an instrument of your peace.

sections.title: Send Your Glory Down
sections.author: Trevor Thomson
sections.snippet: O Radiant Light Devine,  Shine within this heart of mine; Word of God, dispel our darkness. O Image of the Light Sublime, our god Incarnate beyond time, That fills this place with heaven's glory.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
